title: Verify existing implementation of bad-types.ts
description: The file src/utils/bad-types.ts already exists with the correct content: `function getCount(): string { return 42 }`. Typecheck correctly fails with error TS2322. The ship stage was failing due to git divergence - fixed by resetting branch to match origin/1746--mem-20260410-1437-mf2-add-function-with-wrong at commit c0d6787.
